title: Energy Security Risks Go Beyond Imports As Fossil Fuel Dependence Exposes India: CEEW Study
description: (MENAFN - KNN India) New Delhi, Jun 19 (KNN) India's energy security challenge extends well beyond the volume of coal, oil and gas it imports, with the deeper risk lying in a fossil fuel system ...

title: Thousand-year-old ancient oak tree linked to 'Robin Hood' legend has died, experts say
description: A giant, ancient oak tree -- the iconic setting of the 'Robin Hood' legend -- has died, one of the U.K.'s top bird and wildlife conservation charities said.
